summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard captures a top‑notch summer performance highlighted by a blazing China / Riders on the Storm.
review: Both reviewers rave about an amazing show, singling out the China/Riders on the Storm sequence as firing on all engines. The mix is described as crystal clear and top‑notch, indicating a high‑quality soundboard recording that makes the summer vibe shine through.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews give 5 stars, praising both performance and audio quality; with limited sample size (2 reviews) confidence is medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as crystal clear and a top‑notch mix; no reported issues, indicating a crisp, well‑balanced recording.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic summer set with smooth transitions, especially the blazing China/Riders sequence.
